title: Villager Coin Official Starter Pack
description: Official starter pack for Villager Coin that adds coins to loot tables, mob drops, and villager trades. Includes official VC addons like Coin Banks, Coin Stacks, Bookkeeping, and Collectable Coins.
body:
# VillagerUnknown's Villager Coin Official Starter Pack

Official starter pack for Villager Coin.

Villager Coin is a lightweight currency library that adds customizable coin currencies and optionally adds the currencies to loot tables, mob drops, and merchant trades. Coins can be converted between different types through the crafting table.

Villager Coin, on its own, consists of craftable receipts and 5 types of coins with their own value: Copper, Iron, Gold, Emerald, and Netherite. More coins can be added, like edible, collectable, cursed, and lucky coins, with addon mods.

Checkout the showcase on YouTube at https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Djl_DBBfbxc

This modpack includes the official addons.

## Included Mods

- Villager Coin
- Coin Banks for Villager Coin
- Coin Stacks for Villager Coin
- Edible Coins for Villager Coin
- Collectable Coins for Villager Coin
- Lucky Coins for Villager Coin
- Cursed Coins for Villager Coin
- Bookkeeping for Villager Coin

## Included Resource Packs

_Resource packs are disabled by default._

- Square Coins for Villager Coin
